title: Implement Self-Healing Introspection
description: Utilize `v8.getHeapStatistics()` and `process.resourceUsage()` for runtime introspection of Node.js processes. Architect self-healing systems that can detect impending Out-Of-Memory (OOM) events. Implement graceful restart mechanisms triggered by resource usage thresholds to prevent catastrophic failures.
objectives: Utilize `v8.getHeapStatistics()` and `process.resourceUsage()` for runtime introspection of Node.js processes.
Architect self-healing systems that can detect impending Out-Of-Memory (OOM) events.
Implement graceful restart mechanisms triggered by resource usage thresholds to prevent catastrophic failures.
